ogtitle: Amending your Trade Finance Online profile
content: Skip to login   Skip to main content   Skip to chat   Business   Online banking   NAB Connect online banking   NAB Connect help   Specialised services and financial files   Specialised services   Amending your Trade Finance Online profile   Amending your Trade Finance Online profile   Learn how to perform the most common tasks in Trade Finance Online.  Why follow this guide?  To understand the different tasks you can complete via Trade Finance Online and how to action these.  How to change your Trade Finance Online profile   These short guides are designed to help with commonly performed tasks in Trade Finance Online, including:  initiating a form  populating a form  closing a form  trade calendar   alerts   maintain lists  reporting   request outstanding trade transaction report  roles and authorisations.  Trade Finance Loan  How to create a new Trade Finance loan request (PDF, 1MB), opens in new window  How to extend a Trade Finanace loan (PDF, 347KB), opens in new window  How to Repay a Trade Finance loan (PDF, 1MB), opens in new window  Import Letter of Credit  How to request a new Import Letter of Credit (PDF, 1MB), opens in new window  How to request an Amendment to an Import Letter of Credit (PDF, 813KB), opens in new window  How to provide acceptance or payment instructions for drawings under an Import Letter of Credit (PDF, 948KB), opens in new window  Administration  How to extract transaction advices (PDF, 733KB), opens in new window  How to create Standard Clauses (PDF, 543KB), opens in new window  Please note  If you need to make a change to your Trade Finance Online profile, speak to your Business banking representative.  Related guides  See some of our other guides to help you get the most out of NAB Connect.  Trade and invoice finance   Trade and invoice finance solutions to help your trading business. We have trade and working capital specialists to help you trade locally and overseas.  Express business deposit changes   We’re making some changes to express business deposits.  Download a cheque image   Use our guide to learn how to download a cheque image in NAB Connect.  Contact us for NAB Connect enquiries  Call us   Monday to Friday, 7:30am to 8:00pm (AEST/AEDT)  Saturday, 9:00am to 2:00pm (AEST/AEDT)  Within Australia: 1300 888 413  Overseas: +61 3 8641 9930  Important information  This section contains Important Information relevant to the page you are viewing, but you can't see it because you have JavaScript disabled on your browser. Please enable JavaScript and come back so you can see the complete page. It's important that you read the Important Information in this section before acting on any information on this page.
